legal.title: Legal
legal.metaDesc: Legal notices, terms of use and privacy policy of MyTaptap.
legal.legalEditor: Publisher: MyTaptap — an online service for creating personalized link pages.
legal.termsAcceptText: By using MyTaptap, you agree to these terms of use. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
legal.termsServiceText: MyTaptap is a platform for creating and managing personalized link pages. The service is available in free and paid versions.
legal.termsAccountText: You are responsible for the security of your account and all activities that occur under it. You must provide accurate information during registration.
legal.termsContentText: You retain ownership of your content. You agree not to publish illegal, defamatory, or infringing content.
legal.termsTerminationText: You can delete your account at any time by contacting support. We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms.
legal.termsLiabilityText: MyTaptap is provided "as is." We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation and are not liable for indirect damages related to the use of the service.
legal.privacyCollectText: We collect: email address, username, profile data you provide, and click statistics on your links.
legal.privacyUseText: Your data is used to provide the service, improve user experience, and display your link statistics.
legal.privacySharingText: We do not sell your data. It may be shared with our technical partners (hosting, payment) strictly for service operation.
legal.privacyCookiesText: We use essential cookies for service operation (authentication, language preferences). No advertising cookies are used.
legal.privacyRightsText: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your data. Contact us to exercise these rights.
legal.privacyContactText: For any questions about your personal data: support@mytaptap.com
